packs.name: AR Collections Assistant
packs.description: Automates accounts-receivable collections workflows: overdue invoice detection, reminder drafting, escalation routing, and payment reconciliation. Integrates with ERP systems via MCP tools. Requires AR_ERP_URL and AR_ERP_TOKEN environment variables.
packs.description_zh: 自动化应收账款催收流程：识别逾期发票、起草催款提醒、升级路由以及收款对账。通过 MCP 工具与 ERP 系统集成。需要配置 AR_ERP_URL 与 AR_ERP_TOKEN 环境变量。

overdue_days_threshold.description: Days past due before sending first reminder

escalation_days_threshold.description: Days past due before escalating to collections team

packs.name: Incident Triage
packs.description: On-call incident triage assistant: classifies severity, correlates related alerts, drafts runbooks, and pages the right team. Connects to PagerDuty, Opsgenie, or webhooks. Reduces mean-time-to-acknowledge by surfacing context from past incidents.
packs.description_zh: 值班事件分诊助手：判定严重级别、关联相关告警、起草运行手册并呼叫对应团队。可对接 PagerDuty、Opsgenie 或 webhook。通过呈现历史事件的上下文，缩短平均确认时间（MTTA）。

auto_page_threshold.description: Minimum severity level for automatic paging

context_window_hours.description: Hours of past incidents to include as context

packs.name: PR Review Assistant
packs.description: Automated pull-request review: checks for style violations, security anti-patterns, missing tests, and documentation gaps. Posts inline comments via the GitHub or GitLab API. Configurable checklist per repository.
packs.description_zh: 自动化的拉取请求（PR）评审：检查代码风格违规、安全反模式、缺失的测试以及文档缺口。通过 GitHub 或 GitLab API 发布行内评论。可按仓库配置检查清单。

review_scope.description: Whether to review the full file or only changed lines

require_tests.description: Flag PRs that reduce test coverage

max_files_per_review.description: Skip review if PR touches more files than this

packs.name: HR Onboarding
packs.description: Guided employee onboarding assistant: answers policy questions, schedules orientation meetings, tracks completion of required readings, and generates personalised 30/60/90-day plans. Integrates with HRIS and calendar systems.
packs.description_zh: 引导式员工入职助手：解答政策问题、安排入职培训会议、跟踪必读材料的完成情况，并生成个性化的 30/60/90 天计划。可与 HRIS 及日历系统集成。

onboarding_duration_days.description: Length of the structured onboarding period

send_welcome_email.description: Automatically send welcome email on first login

checklist_template.description: Which onboarding checklist template to use

packs.name: Legal Document RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over a legal document corpus: contracts, policies, court opinions, and regulatory filings. Answers questions with source citations and confidence scores. Index your documents via the CLI before enabling.
packs.description_zh: 面向法律文档语料库的检索增强问答（RAG）：涵盖合同、政策、法院判决意见和监管申报文件。回答问题时附带来源引用和置信度评分。启用前请先通过 CLI 为文档建立索引。

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

citation_style.description: How citations appear in the response

packs.name: Finance Document RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over financial documents: annual reports, earnings calls, 10-K/10-Q filings, analyst notes, and internal finance policies. Ideal for FP&A teams doing research across large document sets.
packs.description_zh: 面向财务文档的检索增强问答（RAG）：涵盖年报、财报电话会议、10-K/10-Q 申报文件、分析师笔记以及内部财务政策。非常适合需要在海量文档集中开展研究的 FP&A 团队。

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

fiscal_year_filter.description: Restrict results to the current fiscal year by default

packs.name: DevOps On-Call
packs.description: Real-time alert triage and runbook automation for on-call engineers. Classifies incoming alerts (P1/P2/P3), maps them to suspected components, looks up matching runbook steps, and attaches an observability snapshot (metrics + log excerpts) before paging the engineer. Distinct from incident-triage, which handles post-incident RCA. Supports PagerDuty, Opsgenie, and Alertmanager inbound sources.
packs.description_zh: 面向值班工程师的实时告警分诊与运行手册自动化。对接入告警进行分级（P1/P2/P3），映射到疑似故障组件，查找匹配的运行手册步骤，并在呼叫工程师前附上一份可观测性快照（指标 + 日志摘录）。与负责事后根因分析（RCA）的 incident-triage 不同。支持 PagerDuty、Opsgenie 和 Alertmanager 入站来源。

auto_p1_statuspage.description: Automatically open a Statuspage incident for P1 alerts (requires STATUSPAGE_API_KEY)

snapshot_lookback_minutes.description: Minutes of observability history to include in the snapshot

runbook_match_threshold.description: Minimum runbook match score before falling back to the generic triage runbook

similar_incident_days.description: Days of history to search for similar past incidents

packs.name: HR Policy RAG
packs.description: Retrieval-augmented Q&A over HR documents: employee handbook, benefits guides, PTO policy, code of conduct, and org charts. Employees ask natural-language questions; the assistant cites the exact policy paragraph.
packs.description_zh: 面向人力资源文档的检索增强问答（RAG）：涵盖员工手册、福利指南、带薪休假（PTO）政策、行为准则和组织架构图。员工以自然语言提问，助手会引用确切的政策段落作答。

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

strict_policy_only.description: Decline to answer questions not grounded in retrieved policy text

packs.name: Sales Qualification (BANT + MEDDIC)
packs.name_zh: 销售线索资质评估（BANT + MEDDIC）
packs.description: Multi-agent lead qualification using BANT (Budget/Authority/Need/Timeline) and MEDDIC (Metrics/Economic Buyer/Decision Criteria/Decision Process/Identify Pain/Champion) frameworks. Ingests leads from HubSpot webhooks, Salesforce platform events, or email threads. Outputs structured qualification scores, evidence quotes, MEDDIC completeness checklists, and next-action recommendations. All CRM write-backs are HOTL-gated.
packs.description_zh: 采用 BANT（预算/决策权/需求/时间线）和 MEDDIC（指标/经济买家/决策标准/决策流程/识别痛点/内部支持者）框架的多智能体销售线索资质评估。可从 HubSpot webhook、Salesforce 平台事件或邮件会话中接入线索。输出结构化的资质评分、证据引文、MEDDIC 完整度检查清单以及下一步行动建议。所有对 CRM 的写回操作均经 HOTL（人在回路）审批。

bant_pass_threshold.description: Minimum BANT score (0–100) to advance a lead to MEDDIC deep-dive

meddic_complete_threshold.description: Minimum MEDDIC completeness % to mark a lead as Sales-Qualified

deal_stage_on_sqo.description: CRM deal stage name applied when a lead becomes a Sales-Qualified Opportunity

enrichment_enabled.description: Run web-search enrichment for leads with insufficient BANT data

weekly_digest_cron.description: Cron expression for the weekly pipeline digest (default: Monday 08:00 UTC)

packs.name: VMware Ops
packs.description: VMware infrastructure ops agent-team. Consumes the vmware-skill family over MCP (9 read-only diagnostic servers + vmware-pilot for execution) — reimplements nothing. Ships a conversation-only expert team (vSphere, monitoring, vSAN storage, VKS, NSX, NSX-security, Aria, AVI, hardening) plus an incident-triage agent that drafts an RCA and a change-plan from vCenter/Aria alarms. Every change routes through an Agent Bridge to a vmware-pilot workflow with a HOTL approval gate, audit, and rollback — the team never mutates infrastructure autonomously.
packs.description_zh: VMware 基础设施运维智能体团队。通过 MCP 复用 vmware-skill 家族（9 个只读诊断服务 + 负责执行的 vmware-pilot），不重复造轮子。提供一个纯对话式专家团队（vSphere、监控、vSAN 存储、VKS、NSX、NSX 安全、Aria、AVI、安全加固），外加一个事件分诊智能体，可基于 vCenter/Aria 告警起草根因分析（RCA）和变更方案。每一项变更都经由 Agent Bridge 路由到 vmware-pilot 工作流，并配有 HOTL 审批关卡、审计与回滚——该团队绝不会自主变更基础设施。

advice_only.description: Disable the remediation bridge entirely (pure read-only advice/RCA, no pilot execution path)

auto_triage_severity.description: Minimum vCenter alarm severity that auto-triggers the ops-triage RCA agent

context_window_hours.description: Hours of vCenter events / Aria metrics to gather as RCA context

packs.name: Code Review Assistant
packs.description: General-purpose code review across any repository: explains a diff in plain language, flags style and complexity smells, suggests refactors, and checks for missing tests or docs. Language-agnostic and editor-friendly — drop a diff or a PR URL and get an actionable review.
packs.description_zh: 适用于任意仓库的通用代码评审：用通俗语言解释 diff，标记代码风格和复杂度坏味道，提出重构建议，并检查缺失的测试或文档。与语言无关、对编辑器友好——只需提供一个 diff 或 PR 链接，即可获得可落地的评审意见。

strictness.description: How aggressively to flag style and complexity issues

suggest_refactors.description: Include concrete refactor suggestions, not just findings

max_diff_lines.description: Skip review if the diff exceeds this many changed lines

packs.name: Document Q&A
packs.description: Ask natural-language questions over your own documents and get grounded answers with citations. Works on any indexed collection — wikis, PDFs, runbooks, product docs. The assistant declines to answer when the corpus has no supporting passage, so answers stay trustworthy.
packs.description_zh: 针对你自己的文档以自然语言提问，获得有据可依、附带引用的答案。适用于任何已建索引的集合——wiki、PDF、运行手册、产品文档。当语料库中没有支撑性段落时，助手会拒绝作答，从而保证答案的可信度。

collection_id.description: RAG collection slug to search (must be indexed first)

top_k.description: Number of chunks to retrieve per query

packs.name: SQL Assistant
packs.description: Turn plain-English questions into SQL, explain existing queries, and suggest index or join optimizations. Reads a schema description to ground its output; every generated statement is read-only by default and write statements are HOTL-gated before they run.
packs.description_zh: 将通俗的自然语言问题转换为 SQL，解释现有查询，并提出索引或连接（join）优化建议。它会读取库表结构描述来确保输出贴合实际；默认生成的每条语句均为只读，写入类语句在执行前需经 HOTL 审批。

sql_dialect.description: Target SQL dialect for generated queries

read_only.description: Generate SELECT-only statements unless explicitly overridden

explain_plans.description: Attach an EXPLAIN plan summary to each generated query

packs.name: Customer Support Assistant
packs.description: Drafts replies to inbound support tickets grounded in your help-center articles and past resolutions. Classifies intent, proposes a tone-matched response, and suggests an escalation path for anything it can't confidently answer. All outbound replies are HOTL-gated.
packs.description_zh: 基于你的帮助中心文章和历史解决方案，为接入的支持工单起草回复。它会识别意图、给出语气贴合的回复建议，并为无法有把握回答的问题给出升级路径。所有对外发出的回复均经 HOTL 审批。

auto_escalate_negative_sentiment.description: Escalate tickets with strongly negative sentiment to a human

kb_collection_id.description: RAG collection of help-center articles to ground answers in

packs.name: Meeting Notes & Action Items
packs.description: Turns a raw meeting transcript into a structured summary: key decisions, discussion highlights, and a tracked list of action items with owners and due dates. Optionally posts the summary to a channel and files follow-ups.
packs.description_zh: 将原始会议转录文本转化为结构化摘要：关键决策、讨论要点，以及一份带负责人和截止日期、可跟踪的行动项清单。可选择将摘要发布到指定频道并登记后续待办。

summary_length.description: How much detail to keep in the meeting summary

extract_action_items.description: Pull out owner + due-date action items from the transcript

include_decisions.description: Surface an explicit list of decisions made

packs.name: Release Notes Generator
packs.description: Generates human-readable release notes from a range of commits or merged pull requests. Groups changes by type (features / fixes / chores), writes a one-line summary per entry, and drafts a highlights section for the top of the changelog.
packs.description_zh: 从一段提交记录或已合并的拉取请求中生成易读的发布说明。按类型（功能 / 修复 / 杂项）对变更分组，为每一条目撰写一行摘要，并在变更日志顶部起草一段亮点综述。

grouping.description: How to organise entries in the changelog

include_contributors.description: Append a thank-you list of contributors

include_breaking_changes.description: Call out breaking changes in a dedicated section

packs.name: PPTX / Slide Decks
packs.description: Generate and edit PowerPoint decks from an outline or structured data: build slides, apply layouts and themes, insert charts and tables, and tidy up speaker notes. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; producing an actual deck requires the host agent and the pptx tooling to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: 根据大纲或结构化数据生成与编辑 PowerPoint 演示文稿：创建幻灯片、套用版式与主题、插入图表和表格，并整理演讲者备注。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要真正产出演示文稿，仍需接入宿主智能体及 pptx 工具链。

packs.name: DOCX / Word Documents
packs.description: Author and edit Word documents: apply templates and styles, run mail-merge over a data set, manage headings and tables of contents, and perform find-and-replace. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; generating a real document requires the host agent and the docx tooling to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: 撰写与编辑 Word 文档：套用模板与样式、基于数据集执行邮件合并、管理标题和目录，并进行查找替换。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要真正生成文档，仍需接入宿主智能体及 docx 工具链。

packs.name: XLSX / Spreadsheets
packs.description: Read and write Excel workbooks: build and evaluate formulas, create charts, and produce pivot-style summaries over tabular data. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; operating on a real workbook requires the host agent and the xlsx tooling to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: 读写 Excel 工作簿：构建并计算公式、创建图表，以及对表格数据生成数据透视式汇总。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要真正操作工作簿，仍需接入宿主智能体及 xlsx 工具链。

packs.name: PDF Toolkit
packs.description: Work with PDF files: extract text and tables, fill form fields, and merge or split documents. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; processing a real PDF requires the host agent and the pdf tooling to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: 处理 PDF 文件：提取文本和表格、填写表单字段，以及合并或拆分文档。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要真正处理 PDF，仍需接入宿主智能体及 pdf 工具链。

packs.name: Superpowers
packs.description: A composable agent-skill framework that breaks complex work into chained subskills — brainstorm, plan, implement, and review — so the agent follows a disciplined workflow instead of improvising. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; running the workflow requires the host agent to drive the subskills.
packs.description_zh: 一套可组合的智能体技能框架，将复杂工作拆解为链式子技能——头脑风暴、规划、实现与评审——让智能体遵循规范化的工作流，而非临场发挥。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要真正运行该工作流，需由宿主智能体来驱动各子技能。

packs.name: Web Research
packs.description: Search the web and answer questions with citations to the sources used. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live search requires a search provider (e.g. an MCP server or a configured search API) to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: 搜索网络并在回答问题时附上所引用来源的出处。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时搜索，需接入一个搜索提供方（例如 MCP 服务器或已配置的搜索 API）。

packs.name: Data Analysis
packs.description: Analyze CSV and tabular data: compute summary statistics, group and aggregate, and draw charts to surface trends. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; analysing your data requires the host agent and a data source to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: 分析 CSV 和表格数据：计算汇总统计量、分组与聚合，并绘制图表以揭示趋势。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要真正分析你的数据，仍需接入宿主智能体和数据源。

packs.name: Diagramming
packs.description: Produce Mermaid and SVG diagrams — flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and sequence diagrams — from a text description. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; rendering inside your environment requires the host agent to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: 根据文字描述生成 Mermaid 和 SVG 图表——流程图、架构图和时序图。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要在你的环境中渲染，仍需接入宿主智能体。

packs.name: MCP Builder
packs.description: Scaffold a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server from a spec — generating tool and resource definitions, handler stubs, and project structure. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; the generated server still needs implementation and the host agent to drive scaffolding.
packs.description_zh: 根据规格说明搭建一个 Model Context Protocol（MCP）服务器脚手架——生成工具与资源定义、处理函数桩代码以及项目结构。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；生成的服务器仍需补充实现，且脚手架搭建需由宿主智能体驱动。

packs.name: Document Translation
packs.description: Translate documents between languages while preserving the original layout, formatting, and structure. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; translating a real document requires the host agent and the relevant document tooling to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: 在不同语言之间翻译文档，同时保留原有的版式、格式和结构。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要真正翻译文档，仍需接入宿主智能体及相应的文档工具链。

packs.name: vSphere Diagnostics
packs.description: Read-only vSphere diagnostics: inventory vCenter and ESXi, and inspect the state of VMs, hosts, and clusters. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live queries require a reachable vCenter and the vSphere MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it never mutates infrastructure.
packs.description_zh: 只读的 vSphere 诊断：盘点 vCenter 和 ESXi 清单，并查看虚拟机、主机和集群的状态。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时查询，需要可达的 vCenter 以及已接入的 vSphere MCP 工具链。只读：绝不变更基础设施。

packs.name: vSphere Monitoring
packs.description: Read-only vSphere monitoring: surface performance metrics, active alarms, and capacity headroom across vCenter. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live metrics require a reachable vCenter and the vSphere MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it never mutates infrastructure.
packs.description_zh: 只读的 vSphere 监控：在 vCenter 范围内呈现性能指标、活动告警和容量余量。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要获取实时指标，需要可达的 vCenter 以及已接入的 vSphere MCP 工具链。只读：绝不变更基础设施。

packs.name: vSAN Storage
packs.description: Read-only vSAN diagnostics: check cluster health, capacity, resync activity, and disk-group status. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live queries require a reachable vCenter and the vSAN MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it never mutates infrastructure.
packs.description_zh: 只读的 vSAN 诊断：检查集群健康状况、容量、重新同步（resync）活动以及磁盘组状态。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时查询，需要可达的 vCenter 以及已接入的 vSAN MCP 工具链。只读：绝不变更基础设施。

packs.name: VKS / Kubernetes
packs.description: Read-only diagnostics for VMware Kubernetes Service (Tanzu): inspect cluster, node, and workload state on supervisor and guest clusters. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live queries require a reachable vCenter and the VKS MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it never mutates infrastructure.
packs.description_zh: 面向 VMware Kubernetes Service（Tanzu）的只读诊断：查看 supervisor 集群和 guest 集群上的集群、节点及工作负载状态。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时查询，需要可达的 vCenter 以及已接入的 VKS MCP 工具链。只读：绝不变更基础设施。

packs.name: NSX Networking
packs.description: Read-only NSX-T networking diagnostics: inspect logical switching and routing, segments, and the state of network services. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live queries require a reachable NSX manager and the NSX MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it never mutates infrastructure.
packs.description_zh: 只读的 NSX-T 网络诊断：查看逻辑交换与路由、网段（segment）以及网络服务的状态。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时查询，需要可达的 NSX manager 以及已接入的 NSX MCP 工具链。只读：绝不变更基础设施。

packs.name: NSX Security
packs.description: Read-only NSX security review: inspect the distributed firewall and micro-segmentation policy, and audit rule coverage between workloads. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live queries require a reachable NSX manager and the NSX MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it never mutates infrastructure.
packs.description_zh: 只读的 NSX 安全审查：查看分布式防火墙和微分段（micro-segmentation）策略，并审计工作负载之间的规则覆盖情况。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时查询，需要可达的 NSX manager 以及已接入的 NSX MCP 工具链。只读：绝不变更基础设施。

packs.name: Aria Operations
packs.description: Read-only Aria Operations (vROps) diagnostics: review cluster and workload health, optimization recommendations, and automation insights. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live queries require a reachable Aria Operations instance and the Aria MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it never mutates infrastructure.
packs.description_zh: 只读的 Aria Operations（vROps）诊断：查看集群和工作负载健康状况、优化建议以及自动化洞察。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时查询，需要可达的 Aria Operations 实例以及已接入的 Aria MCP 工具链。只读：绝不变更基础设施。

packs.name: AVI Load Balancing
packs.description: Read-only NSX ALB / Avi diagnostics: inspect virtual services, pools, and back-end health, and review load-balancing configuration. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live queries require a reachable Avi controller and the Avi MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it never mutates infrastructure.
packs.description_zh: 只读的 NSX ALB / Avi 诊断：查看虚拟服务（virtual service）、服务器池（pool）和后端健康状况，并审阅负载均衡配置。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时查询，需要可达的 Avi controller 以及已接入的 Avi MCP 工具链。只读：绝不变更基础设施。

packs.name: vSphere Hardening
packs.description: Read-only vSphere hardening review: evaluate the environment against a security baseline and report compliance gaps and misconfigurations. Part of the vmware-skill diagnostic family. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; live checks require a reachable vCenter and the vSphere MCP tooling to be wired in. Read-only: it reports findings but never changes configuration.
packs.description_zh: 只读的 vSphere 安全加固审查：依据安全基线评估环境，并报告合规缺口与配置错误。属于 vmware-skill 诊断家族的一部分。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要进行实时检查，需要可达的 vCenter 以及已接入的 vSphere MCP 工具链。只读：仅报告发现项，绝不更改配置。

packs.name: vmware-pilot (Execution)
packs.description: The change-execution pilot for the vmware-skill family — and the only member that mutates infrastructure. Every change is HOTL-gated: it routes through an explicit approval step and ships with audit and rollback. This is a skill template — installing records configuration; executing changes requires a reachable vCenter, the pilot MCP tooling, and an approver to be wired in.
packs.description_zh: vmware-skill 家族中负责变更执行的 pilot——也是唯一会变更基础设施的成员。每一项变更都经 HOTL 审批：必须经过显式的审批步骤，并配有审计与回滚。这是一个技能模板——安装仅记录配置；要真正执行变更，需要可达的 vCenter、pilot MCP 工具链以及一名已接入的审批人。
